Package org.mitre.synthea.helpers

Class ChartRenderer

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.helpers.ChartRenderer
public class ChartRenderer extends Object
This class provides methods to create and render charts using JFreeChart.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ChartRenderer.Base64EncodedChart
    Represents a base64 encoded chart image.
    static class 
    ChartRenderer.ChartConfig
    POJO configuration for a chart.
    static enum 
    ChartRenderer.ChartType
    Enumeration of supported chart types.
    static class 
    ChartRenderer.MultiTableChartConfig
    POJO configuration for a chart with data from a MultiTable.
    static class 
    ChartRenderer.MultiTableSeriesConfig
    POJO configuration for a chart series with data from a MultiTable.
    static class 
    ChartRenderer.PersonChartConfig
    POJO configuration for a chart with data from a Person object.
    static class 
    ChartRenderer.PersonSeriesConfig
    POJO configuration for a chart series with data from a Person object.

  • Method Details

    • createChart

      public static org.jfree.chart.JFreeChart createChart(org.simulator.math.odes.MultiTable table, ChartRenderer.MultiTableChartConfig config)
      Create a JFreeChart object based on values from a MultiTable.
      Parameters:
      table - the MultiTable to retrieve values from.
      config - the chart configuration options.
      Returns:
      the created JFreeChart object.

    • createChart

      public static org.jfree.chart.JFreeChart createChart(Person person, ChartRenderer.PersonChartConfig config)
      Create a JFreeChart object based on values from a Person object.
      Parameters:
      person - the Person instance to retrieve values from.
      config - the chart configuration options.
      Returns:
      the created JFreeChart object.

    • drawChartAsFile

      public static void drawChartAsFile(org.simulator.math.odes.MultiTable table, ChartRenderer.MultiTableChartConfig config)
      Draw a JFreeChart to an image file based on values from a MultiTable.
      Parameters:
      table - the MultiTable to retrieve values from.
      config - the chart configuration options.

    • drawChartAsFile

      public static void drawChartAsFile(Person person, ChartRenderer.PersonChartConfig config)
      Draw a JFreeChart to an image file based on values from a Person object.
      Parameters:
      person - the Person to retrieve attributes from.
      config - the chart configuration options.

    • drawChartAsBase64

      public static ChartRenderer.Base64EncodedChart drawChartAsBase64(org.simulator.math.odes.MultiTable table, ChartRenderer.MultiTableChartConfig config) throws IOException
      Draw a JFreeChart to a base64 encoded image based on values from a MultiTable.
      Parameters:
      table - the MultiTable to retrieve values from.
      config - the chart configuration options.
      Returns:
      the base64 encoded chart image.
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs during encoding.

    • drawChartAsBase64

      public static ChartRenderer.Base64EncodedChart drawChartAsBase64(Person person, ChartRenderer.PersonChartConfig config) throws IOException
      Draw a JFreeChart to a base64 encoded image based on values from a Person object.
      Parameters:
      person - the Person to retrieve attribute values from.
      config - the chart configuration options.
      Returns:
      the base64 encoded chart image.
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs during encoding.
